@graph.dcterms:title: IXO Entity Types
@graph.dcterms:description: Kinds of entity domain on the IXO Spatial Web. Top concepts are the primary entity classes; slash-notation sub-types record specific kinds observed on-chain. A few malformed on-chain variants (protocol/protocol, protocol/protocol_deed, deed/deed, deed/deed_request) are normalised to their base concept; Phase 4 reconciles coverage exhaustively. Sub-type taxonomies for asset, dao, deed, oracle, group, pod and project (from the legacy tags catalogue) are folded in as skos:broader children, so this is the single scheme for entity kinds and their sub-types.

skos:definition.@value: A planned undertaking coordinating resources and activities toward defined goals and measurable outcomes.
A Decentralised Autonomous Organisation coordinating members and sub-groups through on-chain governance.
An agentic service that evaluates claims and supplies verified results to the network.
An item or resource of value owned or controlled by an entity.
A reusable definition used to create and govern entities, claims or credentials of a given kind.
A recorded act or agreement expressing intent or commitment between entities.
An allocation of capital or resources made in expectation of a future return.
An organisational unit grouping members or entities under shared coordination.
A small autonomous sub-group that can act independently while remaining accountable to a parent organisation.
An individual user account represented as an entity.
A human or autonomous agent that acts within the network.
A document resource registered as an entity.
An image resource registered as an entity.
A text resource registered as an entity.
A standalone request entity.
A physical or virtual device represented as an asset, such as a metered cookstove or sensor.
A curated group of related assets managed together.
An asset redeemable for goods or services.
A unit representing verified environmental or social impact.
A digital or physical currency used as a medium of exchange.
A data asset that can be stored, shared or traded.
An asset representing a structured learning programme.
An asset signifying membership rights or privileges.
A POD operating within a parent DAO.
A functional group within a DAO.
A deed appealing or demanding that something be provided or done.
A deed expressing a willingness to provide or do something.
A deed establishing an agreement to receive or support something regularly.
A deed outlining a suggested plan or action for consideration.
An intent-driven workflow coordinating a process from start to finish.
An oracle specialised in evaluating claims to produce verified results.
A protocol defining the content and structure of a class of claims.
A protocol defining the content and structure of a class of deeds.
A protocol defining the governance and operation of a class of DAOs.
A protocol defining a cognitive digital twin system.
A protocol defining the properties of a class of assets.
A protocol defining a class of project domains.
A protocol defining the properties of a class of oracles.
A protocol governing a class of investment processes.
A protocol defining the formation and governance of a class of groups.
A protocol defining a class of requests.
A protocol for creating verifiable claims and defining their content and structure.
A protocol for creating verifiable credentials and defining their content and structure.
A protocol defining how impact is claimed and verified.
A protocol defining an intent-driven workflow.
A decentralized Physical Infrastructure Network that provides real-world services or resources through tokenized incentive mechanisms
An electric vehicle powered by rechargeable fixed or swappable battery packs.
Cooking solutions that reduce emissions and improve health outcomes.
Photovoltaic systems that convert sunlight into electricity.
A digital representation of carbon credits.
A digital representation of water credits.
A voucher representing a bag of fortified beans.
An organisation
A DAO operating as a cooperative, owned and managed by its members for mutual benefit
A legally registered business entity that operates for profit
A DAO combining elements of profit and non-profit structures for diversified objectives
A DAO structured as a joint venture under Lichtenstein laws, allowing shared control and resources
A DAO operating as a non-governmental entity to address social, cultural, or environmental issues
A business-oriented DAO focused on achieving social or environmental objectives rather than profit
A DAO that operates as a public benefit corporation with a focus on public interest
A DAO focused on addressing social challenges while maintaining financial sustainability
A DAO managing or operating a blockchain network
A DAO serving as a validator within a blockchain network
A DAO centered around a specific community for collective action or resource sharing
A DAO supporting software developers and technical projects
A DAO dedicated to allocating and managing funds for various purposes
A DAO focused on managing investments and funding opportunities
A DAO facilitating market transactions and providing liquidity
A DAO that governs a decentralized marketplace, enabling peer-to-peer exchange of goods, services, or digital assets.
A DAO focused on the development, management, and governance of a particular product or set of products
A DAO focused on conducting and supporting research activities
A flow that establishes, verifies, or manages identities and their attributes
A flow that coordinates decision-making, voting, and policy enforcement within a domain or organization
A flow that coordinates the calculation, approval, and distribution of payments or rewards
A flow that creates and configures new domains, including their governance, permissions, and resources
A proposal for managing members
A proposal for managing domain governance
A proposal for managing domain smart contracts
A proposal for managing domain financial resources
A proposal for managing domain staking
A proposal for creating and managing domains
A request to serve as an ambassedor for an organisation
A request to serve as a protector and manager of environmental resources
A request to guide and enable processes or interactions between parties
A request for payment
Configurations of IXO tools for specific use-cases or sectors.
Campaigns, communications assets, and onboarding flows to grow user and developer adoption.
Connect external services (e.g. Chainlink, Filecoin, GPTs, IoT devices) to IXO modules.
Core protocol or app-level improvements.
A request for a specific service to be provided
High-value internal or partner initiatives.
A request for practical work experience or professional training position
An oracle that provides continuous access to data feeds or information streams through a subscription model
Involves human oversight in decision-making processes
Guides users through complex decision-making processes
Identifies patterns in data to inform decision-making and optimize strategies
Automates payments based on impact goal achievements, using smart contracts to streamline transactions
Tracks project performance in real-time, providing feedback and analytics
Tailors interactions and recommendations to individual users, enhancing user experience
Supports strategic planning by predicting trends and resource needs
Ensures compliance with policies and regulations, enforcing rules automatically
Manages and optimizes project portfolios for strategic goals
Determines optimal placement of resources and interventions within the ecosystem
Recommends actions based on data analysis to guide stakeholders towards effective strategies
Anticipates and mitigates potential risks to keep projects on track
Safeguards sensitive information and ensures compliance with regulations
Monitors systems for potential issues, enabling early detection and resolution
Enhances operational efficiency by automating tasks and streamlining workflows
Creates detailed profiles of users and projects for accurate targeting of interventions
Ensures data integrity and authenticity, validating claims and outcomes for transparent impact reporting
Ensures compliance with predefined protocols for consistency and reliability
The primary governance body that proposes and votes on all high-level decisions, including the creation and oversight of specialised committees.
A long-lived multisig council of trusted community stewards empowered to safeguard the chain's best interests and block malicious or harmful actions.
A committee of elected security specialists who monitor, triage, and respond to vulnerabilities affecting the Impact Hub, acting swiftly while remaining accountable to the membership DAO.
An elected treasury team responsible for managing funds, processing approved claim payouts, and providing transparent on-chain financial reporting.
An elected operations desk that executes day-to-day tasks and implements actions ratified through governance, ensuring smooth organisational workflows.
A POD that connects farmers, processors, retailers, and consumers on a unified digital platform, enabling end-to-end transparency and coordination in the food supply chain.
A POD that supercharges grassroots organizing with digital coordination and resource-sharing tools, allowing communities to self-organize without formal hierarchies.
A POD that transforms learning institutions into borderless, digital-first collaboratives, offering global access to courses and training resources.
A POD that turns the traditionally centralized power industry into a decentralized, intelligent network enabling peer-to-peer energy trading.
A POD that reimagines a company or group of companies as a transparent, data-driven, and stakeholder-inclusive entity with automated supply chain management.
A POD that uses digital tools to safeguard natural resources through community-driven, automated management and immutable records of environmental data.
A POD that leverages programmable money and decentralized finance to transform how sustainable projects are funded, enabling conditional funding and tokenization.
A POD that introduces decentralized, software-powered decision-making to public administration, enabling transparent, accountable, and democratic governance.
A POD that leverages open and decentralized networks to fund and conduct science, enabling researchers to collaborate in dynamic teams unrestricted by institutional silos.
A POD that
A POD that integrates smart city technology with decentralized governance to manage urban infrastructure in a collaborative way.

A project designed to influence and modify behaviors to achieve desired outcomes or impacts
A project aimed at promoting resource efficiency, waste reduction, and sustainable economic practices

A project that designs, delivers, and manages structured training programs or courses for learners

A project aimed at reducing the severity or impact of specific risks or issues, such as climate change
